display_information.name: Loki
display_information.description: Personal local agent — your Claude Code, on Slack (runs on your PC)
display_information.long_description:
*How to use Loki*

Loki runs on its owner's PC and executes Claude Code on their behalf.

*1. DM (owner only)*
DM Loki and it works with the owner's configured permission level (up to full read/write/execute on that PC).

*2. @Loki mention in a channel (anyone)*
Anyone in a channel Loki has joined can call `@Loki <question>`.
Guest calls are always *read-only* — no file changes, no command execution. Ask for lookups, summaries, explanations.
Example: `@Loki summarize this channel since last Monday`

*3. Reply in a thread*
Replying in the same thread keeps the conversation context. Start a fresh mention for a new topic.

*4. Notes*
- Replies usually take 15–30s; complex asks can take 1–2+ minutes.
- All requests share the owner's Claude subscription limits — be considerate.
